ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the incident occurred */,
  "city_or_county" TEXT /* City or county where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the incident */,
  "n_killed" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the incident */,
  "n_injured" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the incident */,
  "incident_url" TEXT /* URL to the incident details */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the incident information */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the incident (e.g., homicide, accidental) */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of weapon used in the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "police_response_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the police to respond to the incident */,
  "arrest_made" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an arrest was made */,
  "arrest_details" TEXT /* Details about the arrest if made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "gun_laws_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the state's gun laws (e.g., strict, moderate, lenient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, advocate, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of incident */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., homicide, accidental) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the incident type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the incident type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the incident type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL link to the source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the source (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident to which the detail pertains */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident detail */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the detail was created */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the detail has been verified */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* User who verified the detail */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Date the detail was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident involving the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the victim (e.g., injured, deceased) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the victim */,
  "relationship_to_shooter" TEXT /* Relationship of the victim to the shooter (if known) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident related to the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the incident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the witness saw */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the witness */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the witness */,
  "relationship_to_victim" TEXT /* Relationship of the witness to the victim (if known) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_witnesses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded incidents */,
  "n_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents in that year */,
  "n_killed" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities in that year */,
  "n_injured" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries in that year */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for the historical data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source for the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES incidents ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was enacted */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for the policy */,
  "last_amended_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was last amended */,
  "amended_by" INTEGER /* User who last amended the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_amended_by FOREIGN KEY ("amended_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
